title: Loop Unrolling Example
description: Demonstrates loop unrolling to reduce branch overhead and improve energy efficiency
explanation: Reduces loop control overhead by executing 4 iterations per loop cycle. Fewer branches mean fewer mispredictions and less energy wasted on control logic.

title: Register Allocation Impact
description: Shows how proper register allocation reduces memory accesses
explanation: By hinting the compiler to use registers for frequently accessed variables, we avoid repeated memory loads, significantly reducing energy consumption.

title: Dead Code Elimination
explanation: The compiler identifies code whose results are never used and eliminates it entirely, saving all the energy that would have been spent on computation.

title: Data Layout Optimization
description: Shows structure reorganization for better cache locality
explanation: Restructuring data improves cache line utilization. When processing sequential elements, more useful data is fetched per cache line, reducing memory access energy.
